question: On the Camunda 8.8 Spring Boot starter, what is the replacement property for the deprecated `zeebe.client.broker.keep-alive`?

a.text: The migration table maps the deprecated `zeebe.client.broker.keep-alive` to the new `camunda.client.keep-alive` (env `CAMUNDA_CLIENT_KEEPALIVE`).

b.text: The new namespace drops the `broker` segment entirely; keep-alive is no longer scoped under a `broker.` sub-key.

c.text: The replacement lives under the `camunda.client.*` namespace, not under `zeebe.client.*`; the whole `zeebe.client.*` tree is deprecated.

d.text: There is no `camunda.client.grpc.keep-alive` property; keep-alive sits directly under `camunda.client.*` regardless of transport.

explanation: In the 8.8 Spring Boot starter the `zeebe.client.broker.*` properties are deprecated. The `keep-alive` setting moves directly to `camunda.client.keep-alive` per the migration table on the properties-reference page.

docs.title: Camunda Spring Boot starter properties reference
